name: Masters 25

draft.notes: Every pack contains a foil card (10 commons + 3 uncommons + 1 rare + 1 foil + ad card). Foil slot: common 5/7, uncommon 3/14, rare/mythic 1/14. Ad card has a token on its front face.

sourceNotes: Masters reprint set (Masters 25). 24 packs per box. USA printing, sequential C1/C2 collation. Marketing/ad card carries a token on its front.
